title: TeamLease Skills University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: TeamLease Skills University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the TeamLease Skills University family as a Subject Matter Expert in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TeamLease Skills University:
TeamLease Skills University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TeamLease Skills University!
